name: @node-persistence-api/core
description: Core Node and TypeScript persistence API with JPA-style repositories

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/language/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/pg/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/mysql/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run clean && npm run build && node --test test/*.test.js packages/*/test/*.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run clean && npm run build && node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/e2e/*.test.js
scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.test:packages: npm run clean && npm run build && node --test packages/*/test/*.test.js
scripts.release:pack: rm -rf .release && mkdir -p .release && pnpm pack --pack-destination .release && pnpm --dir packages/language pack --pack-destination ../../.release && pnpm --dir packages/pg pack --pack-destination ../../.release && pnpm --dir packages/mysql pack --pack-destination ../../.release
